The '''Greck''' were a gang of thugs run by the corrupt and criminal businessman [[Olag Greck]], after whom the gang took its name.<ref name="CDAG" /> They were active on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the gang was in open conflict with the [[Corellian Security Force]] (CorSec) and its mercenaries allies of [[Beldonna's League]].<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Greck appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Greck were one of the factions in the game. Greck [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player characters]] randomly spawned on Corellia and were randomly featured in terminal missions. However, they were not involved in any scripted quest.<ref name="SWG" />

Unused game files revealed that the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 28 Notes for April 26, 2006|Publish 28]]," released on [[April 26]], [[2006]],<ref name="SonyForumsCite-What's On Deck! Publish 28 Update Notes, April 26th">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=Announcements&message.id=3077&jump=true|text=What's On Deck! Publish 28 Update Notes, April 26th}}</ref> planned to introduce a questline centered on the Greck. In these quests, the player would have been tasked by CorSec [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dool]] and the [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] city councilmen [[Lyman Zavala]] with investigating the relationship between the [[Chirq Council]] and the Greck criminals. Olag Greck himself was intended to appear in the game, being the final boss to kill to conclude the questline.<ref name="SWG:SK">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|directory tree files}}</ref>
